title: GitAdapter v2 read-only: ramas, tags, log y diff-report
wave: Ola 4 — Repo intelligence y revisión industrial

architectural_decision.reason: FUNC-SPRINT-35 amplía un adaptador existente en modo read-only, no introduce dependencias externas, red, APIs, UI, backend, sandbox real ni ejecución destructiva. Mantiene la arquitectura local-first y gobernada definida en Fases A/B.

pass_criteria: GitAdapter v2 operates only in read-only mode.
Branches, tags and bounded log commands return JSON-serializable CommandResult payloads.
git diff-report generates structured file, line and risk metadata and can write JSON/Markdown evidence.
Write-capable Git commands are blocked by allowlist.
A non-Git repository returns controlled warning output without crashing.
block_criteria: Any Git write operation is exposed or allowed.
A command uses shell=True or a free shell string.
A non-Git repository raises an uncontrolled exception.
Sprint 35 is documented as patch apply, sandbox or Git write.
risks: Diff risk classification is heuristic and preliminary.
Large diffs are bounded and may be truncated.
No remote, submodule, LFS or signature analysis is implemented yet.
next_sprint: FUNC-SPRINT-36 — DependencyGraph e import graph Python
